narrative:
Inaccuracies on my credit report, even after multiple dispute attempts. Despite my efforts, the information remains incorrect and continues to impact my credit profile negatively. 

The credit bureaus are in violation of the Fair Credit Reporting Act ( FCRA ) as follows : FCRA Section 1681c ( Exclusion of Information After Specific Periods ) Outdated information is still being reported, violating the FCRAs requirement to remove such data after the legally allowed time frame.

FCRA Section 1681i ( a ) ( 1 ) ( A ) ( Reinvestigation of Disputed Information ) The credit bureaus have not conducted a reasonable re-investigation of the disputed accounts or provided proof of their accuracy.

FCRA Section 1681e ( b ) ( Accuracy of Information ) By continuing to report inaccurate information, the credit bureaus have failed to ensure that my credit report reflects the maximum possible accuracy.

I request that the CFPB investigate these violations and ensure that the credit bureaus take corrective action to address these issues and bring my credit report into compliance with the FCRA.
product: Credit reporting or other personal consumer reports

narrative:
NEW REZ-SHELL POINT is reporting late payments for account number XXXX and have failed to provide proof of late payments. 
XXXX : XX/XX/XXXX : XXXX, XXXX, XXXX, XX/XX/XXXX : XXXX, XXXX I demand you to furnish evidence that your reporting mechanism is not defaulted or there is no default in your reporting mechanism. 

It is an unfair act for late payments to be reported. Who did you speak to? 
My finger prints? 
Original contract? 
License number? 
Wet ink signature? 
Please do not send any statements. I will question the authenticity of any statements sent. I demand removal for failure to produce the original contract. It is alleged debt until it can be proven. With no supporting evidence it must come off the report. 

Please move forward with the above request. Failure to complete request I will sue for each violation not limited to but including reporting information without my consent, invading my privacy, and defamation of character under permissible purpose ( 15 usc 1681 )

narrative:
I am writing to you regarding a violation of my privacy and confidentiality rights, protected under the Fair Credit Reporting Act ( 15 USC 1681b ( XXXX ) ). Pursuant to 18 USC 8, I have identified the following accounts that have breached these legal provisions : XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX These accounts have accessed my credit information without my explicit authorization, which constitutes a violation of my privacy and confidentiality rights. Additionally, some of these accounts contain obsolete information that should be excluded from my credit report as stipulated in 15 USC 1681c ( a ) ( XXXX ). 
According to 15 USC 1681, Section 602 ( A ), I have the right to privacy. Furthermore, under 15 USC 1681, Section 604 ( A ), Section XXXX, a consumer reporting agency can not furnish an account without my written instructions. Also, 15 USC 1681c ( a ) ( XXXX ) states that no consumer reporting agency may include any adverse item of information that is more than XXXX XXXX  old, other than records of convictions of crimes. 
Finally, under 15 USC 1681s-2 ( a ) ( XXXX ), no person shall furnish any information relating to a consumer to any consumer reporting agency if the person knows or has reasonable cause to believe that the information is inaccurate. Additionally, according to 15 USC 1681s-2 ( a ) ( XXXX ) ( B ), a person shall not furnish information if ( i ) the person has been notified by the consumer that specific information is inaccurate, and ( ii ) the information is, in fact, inaccurate.
product: Credit reporting or other personal consumer reports

narrative: A person took out a title loan in my name online. The company that was used is called Speedy Cash. The title loan is for {$2600.00}. The title loan is also for a vehicle that I do not own, for several years now. This all happened on XX/XX/2024. I filled a police report and also notified speedy cash of the fraud activity. I sent in the requested documents to speedy cash for the fraudulent loan. I did not take out this title loan. I called in the morning of XX/XX/2024 to pay off my loan in full, I did that. Then about XXXX min after I received multiple change password email, log in new device email from speedy cash. Then I received a loan funded email and that's when I called them to report the fraud. They closed my account and investigation underway. It makes me think a speedy cash employee is doing this because it happened only XXXX min after I paid off my loan with them. I have the paid in full receipt from my loan. The fraudulent funds were sent to a debit card that is not mine. The fraudulent loan number is XXXX. I also have my credit frozen. Just wanted to inform the CFPB that someone took a title loan in my name using a vehicle that I do not own for several years for the amount of {$2600.00}. I appreciate your time and help. Currently waiting for a response with speedy cash after I submitted a fraud packet that they requested.
